messages.content:
You are running a DAComp data-analysis task inside DeepEye. Use the attached SQLite datasource as the authoritative data source. Produce a detailed Chinese analytical report with quantitative evidence, explicit formulas/rules, and final recommendations. The final answer MUST be written in Chinese only. Do not use English headings or English narrative. Do not invent table names.

Workflow constraints:
- For python.code nodes, load the complete upstream datasets with load_dataset_ref(ref) or load_dataset_refs(data). Do not compute from dataset_ref.preview_rows except for schema inspection.
- The annual_rate_&_churn table is an interest-rate/churn curve by annual interest rate, not a company entity table. Do not merge company credit ratings to the row index of that table.
- If using the churn curve, derive a rating-specific rule by choosing or optimizing an annual interest rate for each rating, then map that rule to companies by Credit Rating.

Task ID: dacomp-zh-031
Instruction:
分析不同工作年限区间(0-5年、6-10年、11-15年、16-20年、20年以上)员工的当前在职状态，挖掘在本司长期留任(10年及以上)的员工具备哪些特征。从这些数据看，为提升员工留任时间，公司可以采取哪些具体的举措？

Database profile:
SQLite file: dacomp-zh-031.sqlite

Table: 工作表1
Rows: 1480
Columns: 员工ID TEXT, 年龄 INTEGER, 年龄段 TEXT, 员工流失 TEXT, 出差 TEXT, 日薪 INTEGER, 部门 TEXT, 离家距离 INTEGER, 学历 INTEGER, 专业领域 TEXT, 员工总数 INTEGER, 员工编号 INTEGER, 工作环境满意度 INTEGER, 性别 TEXT, 时薪 INTEGER, 工作投入度 INTEGER, 职级 INTEGER, 职位 TEXT, 工作满意度 INTEGER, 婚姻状况 TEXT, 月收入 INTEGER, 薪资等级 TEXT, 月薪标准 INTEGER, 工作过的公司数量 INTEGER, 是否年满18岁 TEXT, 是否加班 TEXT, 薪资涨幅 INTEGER, 绩效评分 INTEGER, 人际关系满意度 INTEGER, 标准工时 INTEGER, 股票期权级别 INTEGER, 总工作年限 INTEGER, 去年培训次数 INTEGER, 工作与生活平衡 INTEGER, 在本公司工龄 INTEGER, 在当前职位年限 INTEGER, 距离上次晋升年限 INTEGER, 与现任经理共事年限 REAL

subSteps.name: create_workflow_and_run
subSteps.input: {'planning_notes': "1) Use sql.execute to query the database table and categorize employees by work years into bins (0-5, 6-10, 11-15, 16-20, 20+). The '在本公司工龄' column will be used for this. 2) Group by the work years bins and employee retention status ('员工流失') to get counts. 3) For the long-term employees (10+ years), filter and select relevant features like '部门', '职级', '工作满意度', '工作环境满意度', '工作投入度', '绩效评分'. 4) Use llm.answer to generate the final report based on the analysis.", 'workflow': {'root': {'nodes': {'query_employees': {'id': 'query_employees', 'type': 'sql.execute', 'params': {'datasource_id': '6bd7f731-4b51-477d-80be-6cd43d54c315', 'query': 'SELECT CASE WHEN "在本公司工龄" <= 5 THEN \'0-5年\' WHEN "在本公司工龄" <= 10 THEN \'6-10年\' WHEN "在本公司工龄" <= 15 THEN \'11-15年\' WHEN "在本公司工龄" <= 20 THEN \'16-20年\' ELSE \'20年以上\' END AS 工作年限区间, "员工流失", COUNT(*) AS 员工数量 FROM "工作表1" GROUP BY 工作年限区间, "员工流失" ORDER BY 工作年限区间'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 120, 'y': 120}}}, 'query_long_term_employees': {'id': 'query_long_term_employees', 'type': 'sql.execute', 'params': {'datasource_id': '6bd7f731-4b51-477d-80be-6cd43d54c315', 'query': 'SELECT "部门", "职级", "工作满意度", "工作环境满意度", "工作投入度", "绩效评分" FROM "工作表1" WHERE "在本公司工龄" >= 10'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 120, 'y': 320}}}, 'answer': {'id': 'answer', 'type': 'llm.answer', 'params': {'question': '分析不同工作年限区间(0-5年、6-10年、11-15年、16-20年、20年以上)员工的当前在职状态，并挖掘在本司长期留任(10年及以上)的员工特征。'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 420, 'y': 220}}}}, 'edges': {'edge_query_to_answer': {'id': 'edge_query_to_answer', 'source': {'node_id': 'query_employees', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'answer', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_long_term_to_answer': {'id': 'edge_long_term_to_answer', 'source': {'node_id': 'query_long_term_employees', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'answer', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}}}}}

subSteps.input: {'draft_id': 'ab3dfd27-63dd-42d9-a1b3-583be66eaf34', 'planning_notes': "1) Use sql.execute to query the database table and categorize employees by work years into bins (0-5, 6-10, 11-15, 16-20, 20+). final report based on the combined analysis.", 'workflow': '{\'root\': {\'nodes\': {\'query_employees\': {\'id\': \'query_employees\', \'type\': \'sql.execute\', \'params\': {\'datasource_id\': \'6bd7f731-4b51-477d-80be-6cd43d54c315\', \'query\': \'SELECT CASE WHEN "在本公司工龄" <= 5 THEN \\\'0-5年\\\' WHEN "在本公司工龄" <= 10 THEN \\\'6-10年\\\' WHEN "在本公司工龄" <= 15 THEN \\\'11-15年\\\' WHEN "在本公司工龄" <= 20 THEN \\\'16-20年\\\' ELSE \\\'20年以上\\\' END AS 工作年限区间, "员工流失", COUNT(*) AS 员工数量 FROM "工作表1" GROUP BY 工作年限区间, "员工流失" ORDER BY 工作年限区间\'}, \'metadata\': {\'position\': {\'x\': 120, \'y\': 120}}}, \'query_long_term_employees\': {\'id\': \'query_long_term_employees\', \'type\': \'sql.execute\', \'params\': {\'datasource_id\': \'6bd7f731-4b51-477d-80be-6cd43d54c315\', \'query\': \'SELECT "部门", "职级", "工作满意度", "工作环境满意度", "工作投入度", "绩效评分" FROM "工作表1" WHERE "在本公司工龄" >= 10\'}, \'metadata\': {\'position\': {\'x\': 120, \'y\': 320}}}, \'combine_results\': {\'id\': \'combine_results\', \'type\': \'python.code\', \'params\': {\'code\': \'import sys, json\\n\\ndata = json.load(sys.stdin)\\nemployees_df = load_dataset_ref(data[\\\'dataset_ref\\\'][0])\\nlong_term_df = load_dataset_ref(data[\\\'dataset_ref\\\'][1])\\n\\n# Combine the results into a single dataset\\ncombined_data = {\\n    "工作年限区间": employees_df[\\\'工作年限区间\\\'].tolist(),\\n    "员工流失": subSteps.name: update_workflow
subSteps.input:
{'draft_id': 'ab3dfd27-63dd-42d9-a1b3-583be66eaf34', 'planning_notes': "1) Use sql.execute to query the database table and categorize employees by work years into bins (0-5, 6-10, 11-15, 16-20, 20+). The '在本公司工龄' column will be used for this. 2) Group by the work years bins and employee retention status ('员工流失') to get counts. 3) For the long-term employees (10+ years), filter and select relevant features like '部门', '职级', '工作满意度', '工作环境满意度', '工作投入度', '绩效评分'. 4) Use python.code to combine the results from both queries into a single dataset for the final answer. 5) Use llm.answer to generate the final report based on the combined analysis.", 'workflow': {'root': {'nodes': {'query_employees': {'id': 'query_employees', 'type': 'sql.execute', 'params': {'datasource_id': '6bd7f731-4b51-477d-80be-6cd43d54c315', 'query': 'SELECT CASE WHEN "在本公司工龄" <= 5 THEN '0-5年' WHEN "在本公司工龄" <= 10 THEN '6-10年' WHEN "在本公司工龄" <= 15 THEN '11-15年' WHEN "在本公司工龄" <= 20 THEN '16-20年' ELSE '20年以上' END AS 工作年限区间, "员工流失", COUNT(*) AS 员工数量 FROM "工作表1" GROUP BY 工作年限区间, "员工流失" ORDER BY 工作年限区间'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 120, 'y': 120}}}, 'query_long_term_employees': {'id': 'query_long_term_employees', 'type': 'sql.execute', 'params': {'datasource_id': '6bd7f731-4b51-477d-80be-6cd43d54c315', 'query': 'SELECT "部门", "职级", "工作满意度", "工作环境满意度", "工作投入度", "绩效评分" FROM "工作表1" WHERE "在本公司工龄" >= 10'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 120, 'y': 320}}}, 'combine_results': {'id': 'combine_results', 'type': 'python.code', 'params': {'code': 'import sys, json

data = json.load(sys.stdin)
employees_df = load_dataset_ref(data['dataset_ref'][0])
long_term_df = load_dataset_ref(data['dataset_ref'][1])

# Combine the results into a single dataset
combined_data = {
    "工作年限区间": employees_df['工作年限区间'].tolist(),
    "员工流失": employees_df['员工流失'].tolist(),
    "员工数量": employees_df['员工数量'].tolist(),
    "部门": long_term_df['部门'].tolist(),
    "职级": long_term_df['职级'].tolist(),
    "工作满意度": long_term_df['工作满意度'].tolist(),
    "工作环境满意度": long_term_df['工作环境满意度'].tolist(),
    "工作投入度": long_term_df['工作投入度'].tolist(),
    "绩效评分": long_term_df['绩效评分'].tolist()
}

emit_dataframe(combined_data)'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 360, 'y': 220}}}, 'answer': {'id': 'answer', 'type': 'llm.answer', 'params': {'question': '分析不同工作年限区间(0-5年、6-10年、11-15年、16-20年、20年以上)员工的当前在职状态，并挖掘在本司长期留任(10年及以上)的员工特征。'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 660, 'y': 220}}}}, 'edges': {'edge_query_to_combine': {'id': 'edge_query_to_combine', 'source': {'node_id': 'query_employees', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'combine_results', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_long_term_to_combine': {'id': 'edge_long_term_to_combine', 'source': {'node_id': 'query_long_term_employees', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'combine_results', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_combine_to_answer': {'id': 'edge_combine_to_answer', 'source': {'node_id': 'combine_results', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'answer', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}}}}}
